name: Grayscale Stellar Lumens Trust (XLM)
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Overview of the Trust and the Shares Grayscale Stellar Lumens Trust (XLM) (the Trust) is a Delaware Statutory Trust that was formed on October 26, 2018 by the filing of the Certificate of Trust with the Delaware Secretary of State in accordance with the provisions of the Delaware Statutory Trust Act. The Trusts purpose is to hold Stellar Lumens (XLM). The Stellar Ledger uses a consensus mechanism called the Stellar Consensus Protocol which is an implementation of the Fed...
